articles.title: Binance Coin Hack: BNB Price Falls Nearly 4% Due to Suspected Exploit
articles.description: Binance Coin hack: BNB has been seemingly stolen in a suspected hack. The exploit is rumored to be worth around $600m.

articles.title: Binance’s Crypto Dips on Heels of Confirmed Exploit on BNB Chain
articles.description: UPDATED: The hacker successfully extracted around $100 million before being shut down

articles.title: BNB Chain Halted After Suspected Hack, $536M Compromised
articles.description: BNB Chain has been halted after a large BNB holder started displaying erratic on-chain behavior, suggesting a hack. On-chain data suggests a large holder of BNB was hacked. At around 17:30 UTC the wallet began withdrawing sizeable sums of coins it had staked from various blockchain ecosystems. It subsequently started swapping and borrowing tokens from a multitude of different protocols in a very rapid fashion. At the time of writing, the wallet controls over $536,930,715 in various assets.The...

articles.title: Binance confirms BNB cross-chain bridge hack
articles.description: In a developing story, millions of dollars in BNB were transferred by an unknown actor and utilized across a series of web3 lending protocols.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) and Algorand (ALGO) Are Two Blockchains To Watch Next Bull Cycle, Says Coin Bureau – Here’s Why
articles.description: A popular crypto analyst thinks Cardano (ADA) and Algorand (ALGO) will be two blockchains “to watch out for” when the next bull market kicks off. articles.title: Ripple vs. SEC: US Markets Regulator Moves To Block New Third-Party Evidence in XRP Lawsuit
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) wants to block two additional companies from offering input on the regulator’s lawsuit against Ripple. Earlier this week, TapJets, which bills itself as the Uber of private jet chartering, and remittance company I-Remit filed motions to serve as an “amicus curiae” in the case in support of Ripple. articles.title: MakerDao (DAI) Community Chooses Sygnum For $500 Million Diversification Plan
articles.description: Summary: MakerDAO will tap digital bank Sygnum for its diversification effort. This comes after the community voted to deploy excess funds and non-yield-bearing assets from Maker’s treasury into external investment vehicles. Majority of the Maker community opted for a $500 million allocation with an 80-20 split between U.S. short-term Treasury bonds and investment-grade (IG) corporate bonds....

articles.title: How Someone is Attacking the ZCash Network for $10 a Day?
articles.description: Privacy-centric Zcash blockchain is suffering from a spamming attack that resulted in tripling its size to over 100 GB.

articles.title: McDonald Set To Accept Payments In Tether And Bitcoin In Lugana, Switzerland
articles.description: The American multinational fast food chain McDonald’s has started accepting payments in Bitcoin and Tether in Switzerland’s city of Lugana, populated by around 63,000 people. The announcement comes in a tweet by Bitcoin magazine on October 3. And it posted a video in which a customer ordered food using McDonald’s kiosk and paid for it […]
